Hi Dev Team,

To help players accurately test their end-game builds, it would be incredibly useful to see some advanced feature implementations for the Shooting Range.

Currently, it’s hard to measure the exact performance of hybrid, healer, or tank builds. It would be amazing if the shooting range could integrate the following features:

Advanced DPS Tracker: A UI display or target log that shows Total Damage, DPS (Damage Per Second), and the actual Rate of Fire (RPM) during a test phase.

Healing & Support Test Targets: Dynamic friendly NPCs that take continuous damage, allowing players to measure Total Healing and HPS (Healing Per Second) generated by combat medic and support setups.

Aggressive Test Target (Damage Dealer): An enemy NPC capable of dealing controllable, consistent damage to the player. This would allow players to accurately test Tank builds, damage mitigation, shield durability, and overall survivability/toughness.

Having a robust testing environment with these metrics would greatly enhance the theory-crafting community and allow players to optimize their builds for high-level PvP and PvE content.

Thank you for your time and for continuously improving the game!
Put it in clan FOB 😀 also add features that allow you to spawn enemies of any type to test.

Yes absolutely, people in my clan are asking for it too. It's useful to test the builds without having to go directly in a mission. It would be nice to have settings for it too, so we can choose difficulty, enemy, enemy archetype,  the kind of damage...
You would like a shooting range in game? Let us know!
